mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO twin_access_rule_scan_config (id, enter_dispatch_enabled, exit_dispatch_enabled, updated_by) VALUES (#{id}, 1, 1, 'system')
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_access_rule_scan_config SET enter_dispatch_enabled = #{enterDispatchEnabled}, exit_dispatch_enabled = #{exitDispatchEnabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
